text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Haaretz: Israeli soldiers testified to incidents of looting during operations in southern Lebanon, stating that both junior and senior commanders were aware of the behavior but failed to take action. According to the report, soldiers described taking items from homes and civilian properties, with claims that such actions were not isolated but occurred in multiple areas. The testimonies raise concerns over discipline and oversight within units operating in Lebanon, as the report indicates a lack of enforcement despite awareness at command levels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 《国土报》：以色列士兵作证称，在黎巴嫩南部的行动中发生了抢劫事件，并表示初级和高级指挥官都知道这种行为，但未能采取行动。据报道，士兵们描述了从民宅和民用财产中拿走物品的情况，并声称此类行为并非孤立事件，而是在多个地区都有发生。这些证词引发了人们对在黎巴嫩作战部队的纪律和监督的担忧，因为报告指出，尽管指挥层知情，但缺乏执法力度。@wfwitness

text: Reza Pahlavi: With or without the world, with or without Europe, with or without Germany — our fight goes on. The choice is yours.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：无论世界如何，无论欧洲如何，无论德国如何——我们的斗争仍在继续。选择权在你们手中。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Iranians and Jews have a biblical relationship. In fact, the only two countries that can claim that.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：伊朗人和犹太人有着圣经般的关系。事实上，这是仅有的两个可以宣称拥有这种关系的国家。

text: 🇸🇴 🇮🇱 The UK Maritime Trade Operations Center reported a security incident 83 miles southeast off Somalia. According to the report, a cargo ship encountered two small boats carrying armed individuals who opened fire on the ship. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇸🇴 🇮🇱 英国海上贸易行动中心报告称，在索马里东南83英里处发生了一起安全事件。据报道，一艘货船遇到了两艘载有武装人员的小船，这些人员向货船开火。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Reporter: Many people around the world think you are an Israeli asset. Are you? Reza Pahlavi: Of course not. But I am a friend to Israel and to the Jewish people.
text_zh: 记者：世界各地许多人认为你是以色列的资产。你是吗？礼萨·巴列维：当然不是。但我是以色列和犹太人民的朋友。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: Hezbollah has allegedly violated the ceasefire at least seven times since it began, including rocket, drone, anti‑tank missile and IED attacks. An anti‑tank missile was fired near Israeli troops in southern Lebanon. Despite Israeli Defence Minister Katz’s directive to respond with full force from ground and air, Israel has not yet retaliated. Yesterday, Israeli forces did, however, kill a alleged Hezbollah fighter at a alleged launch site in the Sajoud area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列陆军电台：据称真主党自停火协议生效以来至少违反了七次，包括火箭弹、无人机、反坦克导弹和简易爆炸装置袭击。一枚反坦克导弹在黎巴嫩南部以色列军队附近发射。尽管以色列国防部长卡茨指示从地面和空中全力反击，但以色列尚未进行报复。不过，以色列军队昨天确实在萨朱德地区的一个所谓发射点打死了一名所谓的真主党武装人员。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A temporary ceasefire remains in place between Lebanon and Israel ahead of a second round of talks today, but both sides have reported attacks. Israel has kept troops on the ground in southern Lebanon, with about 5% of Lebanese land now under Israeli control. Hezbollah has warned that the truce depends on “a comprehensive halt to attacks across all Lebanese territory”. The IDF said it intercepted a “suspicious aerial target” in southern Lebanon that did not cross into Israeli territory. Israel also reiterated its warning to Lebanese residents not to return to dozens of villages in the south. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在今天第二轮会谈之前，黎巴嫩和以色列之间仍维持临时停火，但双方都报告了袭击事件。以色列在黎巴嫩南部保留了地面部队，目前约5%的黎巴嫩领土处于以色列控制之下。真主党警告称，停火取决于“全面停止对所有黎巴嫩领土的袭击”。以色列国防军称，他们在黎巴嫩南部拦截了一个“可疑空中目标”，该目标未进入以色列领土。以色列还重申警告黎巴嫩居民不要返回南部的数十个村庄。@wfwitness

text: Following the pink Iranian missile for girls, a blue missile has now appeared, dedicated to all the boys of Iran.
text_zh: 继为女孩准备的粉色伊朗导弹之后，现在又出现了一枚蓝色导弹，献给伊朗所有的男孩。

text: WATCH: An Iranian demonstrator threw paint on Reza Pahlavi in Berlin today.
text_zh: 观看：一名伊朗示威者今天在柏林向礼萨·巴列维泼油漆。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BBC: Iran and the United States are showing no signs of backing down, with two rival blockades of the Strait of Hormuz blocking progress in talks. The U.S. believes the economic cost will push Tehran to accept a deal, but Iran’s leaders will not capitulate. “It’s not in the DNA of this system,” a reporter in Tehran said. Iran’s lead negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, said the U.S. naval blockade and U.S. President Trump’s repeated threats to bomb Iran violate the ceasefire and are the main obstacles to genuine negotiations. Intensive mediation efforts, including by Pakistan, are under way to break the impasse. Iran is committed to opening the strait under the fragile ceasefire, but only on its own terms. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BBC：伊朗和美国没有表现出退让的迹象，霍尔木兹海峡的两场相互对峙的封锁阻碍了谈判的进展。美国认为经济成本将迫使德黑兰接受协议，但伊朗领导人不会屈服。德黑兰的一名记者说：“这不符合该体制的基因。”伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，美国的各种海上封锁和美国总统特朗普反复威胁轰炸伊朗违反了停火协议，是真正谈判的主要障碍。包括巴基斯坦在内的密集调解努力正在进行中，以打破僵局。伊朗致力于在脆弱的停火协议下开放海峡，但前提是必须按照他们自己的条件。@wfwitness

text: Reza Pahlavi attacks Western media: I read in your newspapers about the tragedies of war. But what of the regime’s crimes against my compatriots?
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维抨击西方媒体：我在你们的报纸上读到了关于战争悲剧的报道。但该政权对我同胞犯下的罪行又当如何呢？

text: Iran says it has collected its first transit fee revenue from ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran has already been charging select vessels informally (reports of up to $2 million per ship/tanker, sometimes in yuan, crypto, or other means).
text_zh: 伊朗称已从通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只中收取了第一笔过境费收入。伊朗此前一直以非正式方式向部分船只收费（据报道每艘船/油轮最高达200万美元，有时以人民币、加密货币或其他方式支付）。

text: Open Source Intel Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: We’ve been critical of Israel and we are strategic partners with Israel. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047265089439310065/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：我们一直对以色列持批评态度，但我们也是以色列的战略伙伴。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047265089439310065/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it eliminated a Hezbollah operative at a launch site in the Sujud area of southern Lebanon yesterday to prevent a direct threat to northern communities. In a separate incident earlier today, Hezbollah fired an anti-tank missile at IDF forces operating south of the forward defense line in southern Lebanon. The missile struck near the forces. No IDF casualties. The IDF called it a blatant violation of the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军称，昨天在黎巴嫩南部苏朱德地区的一个发射点消灭了一名真主党武装人员，以防止其对北部社区构成直接威胁。在今天早些时候的另一起事件中，真主党向在黎巴嫩南部前沿防线以南活动的以色列国防军部队发射了一枚反坦克导弹。导弹击中了部队附近。以色列国防军没有人员伤亡。以色列国防军称这是对停火协议的公然违反。推文

text: Open Source Intel France’s Macron sits at 23% in the polls as his country grapples with mass immigration from Islamic countries and a severe cost of living crisis. Meanwhile, Macron’s France still cannot stop focusing on Israel. FRANCE WARNS ISRAEL: SANCTIONS COMING WITHIN DAYS 🔴 French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot: “If the Israeli government does not change its policies in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon, we cannot act as if nothing has happened.” Sanctions against Israel are currently being blocked due to Hungary's veto. However, I believe this veto will be lifted (with new Hungary PM) and that these sanctions will be implemented in the coming days.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 法国总统马克龙的支持率仅为23%，因为他的国家正面临来自伊斯兰国家的移民潮和严重的生活成本危机。与此同时，马克龙的法国仍然无法停止关注以色列。法国警告以色列：制裁即将在几天内实施 🔴 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗：“如果以色列政府不改变其在加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的政策，我们就不能表现得好像什么都没发生过一样。”由于匈牙利的否决，针对以色列的制裁目前受阻。然而，我相信这种否决将会被解除（随着匈牙利新总理上任），这些制裁将在未来几天内实施。” - 开源情报 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 🔥 The Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) hit the Russian oil pipeline system "Gorkiy" in the town of Meshih, Nizhegorodskaya Oblast, Russia, which ensures the operation of main oil pipelines The "Gorkiy" oil pipeline system is an important link in Russia's oil transportation system and is part of the structure of JSC "Transneft - Upper Volga". The station transports oil through main pipelines, including in the direction of Surgut - Gorkiy - Polotsk. It ensures the pumping of raw materials to internal routes, including to the "Lukoil" refinery in the city of Kstovo. According to preliminary data, as a result of the strike, three oil tanks were damaged. A large-scale fire occurred over an area of 20 thousand square meters. "The damage to such system-forming stations creates serious disruptions in the logistics of oil supply within Russia. The operation of main pipelines is disrupted, the efficiency of refining at refineries is reduced, and transportation costs increase. As a result, this directly affects the revenues of the Russian budget, which are used to finance the war against Ukraine," reported an informed source in the SBU. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 🔥 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）袭击了位于俄罗斯下诺夫哥罗德州梅希镇的俄罗斯“高尔基”输油管道系统，该系统确保了主要输油管道的运行。“高尔基”输油管道系统是俄罗斯石油运输系统的重要环节，也是俄罗斯国家石油管道运输公司（Transneft - Upper Volga）结构的一部分。该站通过主管道输送石油，包括苏尔古特-高尔基-波洛茨克方向。它确保了原材料向内部路线的输送，包括输送到克斯托沃市的“卢克石油”炼油厂。据初步数据，袭击导致三个储油罐受损。火灾面积达2万平方米。“对这种系统性站点的破坏造成了俄罗斯国内石油供应物流的严重中断。主管道的运行受到干扰，炼油厂的炼油效率降低，运输成本增加。结果，这直接影响了俄罗斯预算的收入，而这些收入被用于资助对乌克兰的战争，”乌克兰国家安全局的一位知情人士报告称。推文

text: WarMonitor Reuters reports Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz, tightening control of the waterway, as Trump says the U.S. will extend the ceasefire indefinitely while talks remain stalled. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047262706915225765/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 路透社报道称，伊朗扣押了两艘在霍尔木兹海峡航行的船只，加强了对该水道的控制，而特朗普表示，在谈判陷入僵局的同时，美国将无限期延长停火协议。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047262706915225765/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BIG: President Abdullahi, President of Somaliland, departed today from Hargeisa on a visit to the United Arab Emirates. Somaliland reporters are framing this as a “strategic mission to the UAE, engaging in high level talks that will shape the nation’s future on the global stage.” The official purpose of the high level meetings has not been disclosed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 重大消息：索马里兰总统阿卜杜拉希今天从哈尔格萨出发，前往阿拉伯联合酋长国进行访问。索马里兰记者将其描述为“前往阿联酋的战略使命，进行将塑造国家在全球舞台上未来的高层会谈。”高层会议的官方目的尚未披露。推文

text: Open Source Intel A hot air balloon carrying 10 people made an emergency landing in a California resident's backyard. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047259436029239425/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一个载有10人的热气球在加利福尼亚州一位居民的后院紧急降落。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047259436029239425/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel FRANCE WARNS ISRAEL: SANCTIONS COMING WITHIN DAYS 🔴 French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot: “If the Israeli government does not change its policies in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon, we cannot act as if nothing has happened.” Sanctions against Israel are currently being blocked due to Hungary's veto. However, I believe this veto will be lifted (with new Hungary PM) and that these sanctions will be implemented in the coming days.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 法国警告以色列：制裁即将在几天内实施 🔴 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗：“如果以色列政府不改变其在加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的政策，我们就不能表现得好像什么都没发生过一样。”由于匈牙利的否决，针对以色列的制裁目前受阻。然而，我相信这种否决将会被解除（随着匈牙利新总理上任），这些制裁将在未来几天内实施。” 推文

text: Visioner 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 Britain is preparing military divers to carry out mine-clearing operations in case they are needed in the Strait of Hormuz, the UK's MoD said. ➡️ Royal Navy specialists trained in mine disposal are being readied alongside uncrewed systems as part of contingency planning. ➡️ It will also contribute autonomous mine-hunting systems to a proposed multinational effort to secure the vital shipping route. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 英国国防部表示，英国正在准备军事潜水员，以备在霍尔木兹海峡需要时进行扫雷行动。 ➡️ 受过排雷训练的皇家海军专家正与无人系统一起准备，作为应急计划的一部分。 ➡️ 它还将为一项拟议中的多国行动提供自主扫雷系统，以确保这一重要航道的安全。推文

text: Reza Pahlavi attacks Western media: It appears to me more often than not that there’s a disconnect between the world media, Western media, from the reality on the ground in Iran. That is stupefying for me. I saw that to some extent in Stockholm and I see another occasion — it looks like you guys are on another planet. You’re not hearing what the people on the streets are saying.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维抨击西方媒体：在我看来，世界媒体、西方媒体与伊朗实地现实之间往往存在脱节。这让我感到震惊。我在斯德哥尔摩看到过这种情况，现在又看到了另一次——看起来你们这些人好像在另一个星球上。你们没有听到街上的人在说什么。

text: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was murdered in an Israeli airstrike in south Lebanon while covering the war. She and a colleague had taken shelter after an initial strike when a second hit the building.
text_zh: 黎巴嫩记者阿迈勒·哈利勒在黎巴嫩南部报道战争时，在以色列的空袭中丧生。她和一名同事在第一次袭击后躲避，随后第二次袭击击中了该建筑物。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Today’s Gen Z in Iran are my biggest supporters. You don’t hear it because you’re disconnected from them.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：今天的伊朗Z世代是我最大的支持者。你们听不到是因为你们与他们脱节了。

text: Someone tampered with a Paris airport weather sensor (possibly with a hair dryer) to fake temperature spikes and win Polymarket bets, making ~$35K. Météo-France confirmed anomalies and filed a criminal complaint. Polymarket switched to a different station while the investigation continues.
text_zh: 有人篡改了巴黎机场的天气传感器（可能用的是吹风机），以伪造温度飙升并赢得Polymarket的赌注，获利约3.5万美元。法国气象局确认了异常情况并提起了刑事诉讼。在调查继续期间，Polymarket已切换到另一个站点。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Ynet: A resident of Rakhassim in northern Israel, in his twenties, has been charged with raping a 13‑year‑old girl he met on the online game Roblox. According to the indictment, Ilai David Nidam threatened to publish intimate photos of her when she did not contact him, and during several meetings he performed indecent acts and raped her against her will. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Ynet：以色列北部拉卡西姆的一名二十多岁的居民被指控强奸了一名他在网络游戏《Roblox》中认识的13岁女孩。根据起诉书，伊莱·大卫·尼达姆在女孩不联系他时威胁要发布她的私密照片，并在几次会面中对他进行了猥亵行为并违背其意愿强奸了她。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Ynet : Israel plans to return to the "evacuated settlement" of Ganim in the northern West Bank as early as this summer. A core group of families, made up of graduates of the Bnei David pre‑military academy, is expected to move to the site, which was "evacuated" under the 2005 disengagement law. The move follows renewed settlement activity at Homesh and Sa‑Nur as part of a broader government push to establish more settlements in the West Bank. The security cabinet approved the return to Ganim in December 2025. Settlement leaders said they aim for “20 times more civilians in Samaria” in the coming years. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Ynet：以色列计划最早于今年夏天重返约旦河西岸北部的“撤离定居点”加尼姆。预计由本·大卫预备役军官学院毕业生组成的核心家庭群体将搬迁到该地点，该地点是根据2005年撤离法“撤离”的。此举是在霍梅什和萨努尔重新进行定居点活动之后，作为政府在西岸建立更多定居点的更广泛推动的一部分。安全内阁于2025年12月批准了重返加尼姆。定居点领导人表示，他们的目标是在未来几年内让“撒马利亚的平民人数增加20倍”。 @wfwitness

text: Reza Pahlavi: Why don't you ask the Iranian people what they think of me? Why don't you ask them why they continue to support me? Why don't you ask them when they come by the hundreds of thousands in demonstrations from Sydney to Vancouver to Munich and Berlin?
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：你们为什么不问问伊朗人民他们怎么看我？为什么不问问他们为什么继续支持我？为什么不问问他们当他们从悉尼到温哥华，再到慕尼黑和柏林，成千上万地参加示威游行时，他们为什么这样做？

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF also said it struck and eliminated a Hezbollah operative yesterday in the Sejoud area of southern Lebanon while he was operating at a launch site, saying the strike was carried out to prevent a direct threat to communities in northern Israel and stop further activity at the site. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军还表示，昨天在黎巴嫩南部塞朱德地区消灭了一名真主党武装人员，当时他正在发射点活动，称此次打击是为了防止对以色列北部社区构成直接威胁并停止该地点的进一步活动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF says Hezbollah launched an ATGM earlier today towards IDF soldiers operating south of the Forward Defense Line in southern Lebanon. The missile hit near the troops, with no injuries reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军称，真主党今天早些时候向在黎巴嫩南部前沿防线以南活动的以色列国防军士兵发射了反坦克导弹。导弹击中了部队附近，没有人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: We’ve been critical of Israel and we are strategic partners with Israel. Source: Breitbart
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：我们一直对以色列持批评态度，但我们也是以色列的战略伙伴。来源：布赖特巴特新闻

text: 🇸🇮 🇵🇸 Slovenia's national broadcaster RTV will not air Eurovision this year, replacing it with a dedicated Palestinian programming week titled "Voices of Palestine." The schedule includes Palestinian films "Gaza's Twins, Come Back to Me," "No Other Land," "The Voice of Hind Rajab," and "The Teacher," alongside political discussion programming. Slovenia joins Spain in refusing to broadcast the contest entirely, going further than simply withdrawing from competition. RTV cited solidarity with Gaza, saying the decision was made "on behalf of the children who died in Gaza." Five countries, Iceland, Ireland, the Netherlands, Slovenia, and Spain, withdrew from Eurovision 2026 in Vienna after the EBU refused to put Israel's exclusion to a vote. Critics pointed to the contrast with Russia, which was ejected in 2022, arguing the EBU applies double standards when it comes to Israel. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇮 🇵🇸 斯洛文尼亚国家广播公司RTV今年将不会转播欧洲歌唱大赛，取而代之的是一个名为“巴勒斯坦之声”的专题巴勒斯坦节目周。节目表包括巴勒斯坦电影《加沙的双胞胎，回到我身边》、《没有其他土地》、《欣德·拉贾布的声音》和《老师》，以及政治讨论节目。斯洛文尼亚加入了西班牙的行列，完全拒绝转播该比赛，这比仅仅退出比赛更进一步。RTV援引了对加沙的声援，称这一决定是“代表在加沙死去的儿童”做出的。冰岛、爱尔兰、荷兰、斯洛文尼亚和西班牙这五个国家在欧洲广播联盟（EBU）拒绝就以色列的排斥进行投票后，退出了2026年维也纳欧洲歌唱大赛。批评人士指出，这与2022年被驱逐的俄罗斯形成了鲜明对比，认为EBU在对待以色列时实行双重标准。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar wants to boost Central Europe’s influence in the EU by deepening ties with neighbors, especially Austria, drawing on their shared past in the Austro-Hungarian Empire. “We used to share a country… I would like to strengthen the relationship between Hungary and Austria,” he said after defeating Viktor Orbán. Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）希望通过加深与邻国（尤其是奥地利）的关系，利用他们在奥匈帝国时期的共同历史，来提升中欧在欧盟的影响力。在击败维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）后，他表示：“我们曾经共享一个国家……我希望加强匈牙利与奥地利之间的关系。”来源：POLITICO

text: Germany's Rheinmetall signed a multi-billion € deal with the Bundeswehr for thousands of FV-014 kamikaze drones with an initial €300M order and deliveries starting 2027. — Up to 10,000+ drones possible (~€2.4B ceiling) — First batch: ~2,500 units — Range: 100 km, endurance: 70 mins — Payload: 6 kg warhead (anti-armor + multi-target)
text_zh: 德国莱茵金属公司（Rheinmetall）与德国联邦国防军签署了一项价值数十亿欧元的合同，提供数千架FV-014自杀式无人机，首批订单价值3亿欧元，将于2027年开始交付。— 可能多达10,000多架无人机（上限约24亿欧元）— 首批：约2,500架 — 航程：100公里，续航时间：70分钟 — 载荷：6公斤弹头（反装甲+多目标）

text: 🇮🇷 Iran receives first revenue from Hormuz Strait fees. “The first revenue received from the Strait of Hormuz tolls was deposited into the Central Bank account” — Iran's second dep Parliament speaker Haji Babaei. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗收到首笔霍尔木兹海峡通行费收入。伊朗议会第二副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）表示：“从霍尔木兹海峡通行费中收到的第一笔收入已存入中央银行账户。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC paints missiles blue at request of Iranian boys who saw pink ones painted for girls. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）应伊朗男孩的要求，将导弹漆成蓝色，此前他们看到为女孩漆成了粉色。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : The war with Iran has entered a damaging new phase: a crippling stalemate in the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian forces attacked three cargo ships on Wednesday, while the US Navy continues its blockade to prevent Iranian oil exports. The ceasefire is indefinite but the strait remains closed, keeping oil prices above $100 a barrel. Mediators are scrambling to restart diplomacy, but Iran has toughened its tone, refusing to return to talks until the blockade is lifted. The IRGC’s “mosquito fleet” of fast‑attack boats continues to threaten commercial shipping. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：与伊朗的战争进入了一个破坏性的新阶段：霍尔木兹海峡陷入了瘫痪性的僵局。伊朗军队周三袭击了三艘货船，而美国海军继续实施封锁以阻止伊朗石油出口。停火协议无限期有效，但海峡仍然关闭，使油价保持在每桶100美元以上。调解人正争分夺秒地试图重启外交，但伊朗态度强硬，拒绝在封锁解除前重返谈判。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的“蚊子舰队”（快艇）继续威胁商业航运。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Norway's sovereign wealth fund lost $136 billion in Q1, largely due to falling U.S. tech stock values. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047257781867049182/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 挪威主权财富基金第一季度亏损 1360 亿美元，主要原因是美国科技股价值下跌。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047257781867049182/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated British Prince Harry has arrived in Kyiv on an unannounced visit. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047255697704833499/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 英国哈里王子已抵达基辅进行未宣布的访问。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047255697704833499/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor A vast marine heat patch now spans about 5,000 miles across the Pacific, drawing concern from climate scientists who warn it could drive up heat, humidity, and the risk of tropical storms in the West in the months ahead. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047254159749959698/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一大片海洋热浪目前横跨太平洋约 5000 英里，引起了气候科学家的担忧，他们警告称这可能会在未来几个月内推高西部的热度、湿度以及热带风暴的风险。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047254159749959698/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A cargo ship was approached by two armed small craft 83nm southeast of Eyl, Somalia. One craft closed to 600 meters before warning shots were fired. The craft returned fire. Both vessels withdrew after the exchange. No injuries reported. UKMTO https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047254156499415200/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一艘货船在索马里埃尔（Eyl）东南 83 海里处遭到两艘武装小艇靠近。其中一艘小艇靠近至 600 米处，随后有人鸣枪示警。小艇开火还击。交火后两艘船只均撤离。未报告有人员伤亡。UKMTO https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047254156499415200/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a likely piracy incident, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre has reported an incident 83nm southeast of Eyl, Somalia where a cargo ship was approached by two small craft with armed individuals on board. After one craft came within 600 meters of the vessel, warning shots were fired and the craft returned fire. Both craft moved away after the exchange of fire and no injuries were reported. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在一起疑似海盗袭击事件中，英国海上贸易行动中心（UKMTO）报告称，在索马里埃尔（Eyl）东南 83 海里处，一艘货船遭到两艘载有武装人员的小艇靠近。在其中一艘小艇进入距离货船 600 米范围内后，有人鸣枪示警，小艇开火还击。交火后两艘小艇均撤离，未报告有人员伤亡。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei commemorated the anniversary of the IRGC’s founding, calling the force an institution “born from the heart of the people”. He paid tribute to the Guards and their "martyrs," adding a verse: “How these noble Braves fight against evil, like lions fighting with arrows and swords.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）纪念伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）成立周年，称该部队是一个“诞生于人民心中”的机构。他向卫队及其“烈士”致敬，并引用了一句诗：“这些高贵的勇士如何对抗邪恶，就像狮子用箭和剑战斗一样。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA: The secretary general of Iran’s shipping association said the U.S. naval blockade will worsen global inflation and fuel shortages, causing significant losses for all countries, with European nations hit even harder than China. He accused the United States of lying about not needing the Strait of Hormuz, and added that shipping traffic continues with the support of Iran’s armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：伊朗航运协会秘书长表示，美国的海军封锁将加剧全球通货膨胀和燃料短缺，给所有国家造成重大损失，其中欧洲国家受到的打击比中国更严重。他指责美国在不需要霍尔木兹海峡的问题上撒谎，并补充说在伊朗武装部队的支持下，航运交通仍在继续。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 AFP: A senior Iranian official stated that Tehran has begun collecting tolls for transit through the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has collected tolls from ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz and deposited the funds into the treasury account, Iranian officials said. “The amount collected from each ship depends on the type and amount of cargo and the level of risk they pose. Iran determines the rules,” said Salimi, a member of the Majlis Presidium. Iranian eputy speaker Haji Babaei added that the first revenue from the tolls has been deposited into the Central Bank account. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 法新社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，德黑兰已开始对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗官员表示，伊朗已向通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取了通行费，并将资金存入国库账户。“每艘船收取的金额取决于货物类型、数量以及它们构成的风险水平。伊朗决定规则，”议会主席团成员萨利米（Salimi）说。伊朗副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）补充说，第一笔通行费收入已存入中央银行账户。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 BREAKING! US Secretary of the Navy John Phelan has resigned, Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell confirmed via social media. Parnell said Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Deputy Defense Secretary Steve Feinberg thanked Phelan for his service. No reason for…" 🇺🇸 Pentagon infighting amid the Iran war. According to Politico, Hegseth was "seriously disappointed" with Phelan's push to build massive, expensive battleships named after Donald Trump. Hegseth and Deputy Secretary Steve Feinberg argued that spending billions on giant warships while adversaries use cheap drones makes no sense. Pentagon leadership wants a shift toward smaller, unmanned vessels. Adding to the friction: Phelan went around Hegseth, cultivating a direct line to Trump by championing his "Golden Fleet" vision. Hegseth viewed it as a breach of the chain of command. Phelan lasted just over a year. His firing is the second senior military departure since the Iran war began. Hegseth previously dismissed the Army Chief of Staff. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 突发！五角大楼发言人肖恩·帕内尔（Sean Parnell）通过社交媒体证实，美国海军部长约翰·费伦（John Phelan）已辞职。帕内尔表示，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）和副国防部长史蒂夫·范伯格（Steve Feinberg）感谢了费伦的服务。没有说明原因……” 🇺🇸 伊朗战争期间五角大楼内部斗争。据《政客》杂志报道，赫格塞斯对费伦推动建造以唐纳德·特朗普命名的大型昂贵战舰感到“非常失望”。赫格塞斯和副部长史蒂夫·范伯格认为，在对手使用廉价无人机的情况下，花费数十亿美元建造巨型军舰毫无意义。五角大楼领导层希望转向更小型的无人舰艇。加剧摩擦的是：费伦绕过赫格塞斯，通过支持他的“黄金舰队”愿景与特朗普建立了直接联系。赫格塞斯认为这违反了指挥链。费伦任职仅一年多。他的解职是伊朗战争开始以来第二次高级军事人员离职。赫格塞斯此前曾解雇了陆军参谋长。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Does Trump want peace? 📝 or is he just buying time? Against the backdrop of yet another ceasefire extension from Trump , a question has arisen: could the White House really be ready to make concessions? After all, the American president spent almost two weeks menacingly puffing his cheeks and promising to strike Iran after April 22, but that never happened. 🖍 But the reason could be much simpler: the Americans are not yet fully prepared for a possible new phase of hostilities. Military transport aviation is working at full capacity, but not all ships have reached their designated areas. 🚩 However, what is evident at the moment is active preparation. This particularly applies to strategic bomber aviation, which remains stationed at Fairford airbase in Great Britain. 🏳️ Since April 16, at least 7 training flights of B-52H and B-1B aircraft have been conducted, which carried out flights over the Mediterranean Sea , over Europe, and into the Atlantic Ocean, practicing various routes for striking Iran. ❗️ For now, everything looks as if the US is preparing for a new strike, and the retention of the bomber grouping confirms this. Moreover, according to our data, B-52H and B-1B pilots were informed in mid-April of a possible extension of their deployment until mid-May . High-resolution map English version #Iran #USA ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版： 📝 特朗普想要和平吗？ 📝 还是他只是在拖延时间？在特朗普又一次延长停火协议的背景下，一个问题出现了：白宫真的准备好做出让步了吗？毕竟，这位美国总统花了近两周时间气势汹汹地虚张声势，承诺在 4 月 22 日之后打击伊朗，但这并没有发生。 🖍 但原因可能简单得多：美国人还没有为可能的新一轮敌对行动做好充分准备。军用运输航空兵正在满负荷运转，但并非所有船只都已到达指定区域。 🚩 然而，目前显而易见的是积极的准备工作。这尤其适用于战略轰炸机航空兵，它们仍驻扎在英国费尔福德空军基地。 🏳️ 自 4 月 16 日以来，至少进行了 7 次 B-52H 和 B-1B 飞机的训练飞行，这些飞机在地中海、欧洲上空以及大西洋上空飞行，演练了打击伊朗的各种路线。 ❗️ 目前，一切看起来就像美国正在为新的打击做准备，轰炸机群的保留证实了这一点。此外，根据我们的数据，B-52H 和 B-1B 飞行员在 4 月中旬被告知其部署可能会延长至 5 月中旬。 高分辨率地图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: The United States has extended its nuclear offer deadline for Iran by a few days, the White House told Reuters. The original deadline was Wednesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：白宫告诉路透社，美国已将对伊朗的核提议截止日期延长了几天。最初的截止日期是周三。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇷🇺 RIA Novosti: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas will not attend the Victory Day events in Moscow on 9 May. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇷🇺 俄新社：巴勒斯坦民族权力机构主席马哈茂德·阿巴斯将不会出席 5 月 9 日在莫斯科举行的胜利日活动。 @wfwitness
